title: Bolsius Basic Candles for Decoration, Ceramic, White, Dimensions Cero singolo: Height 11.8 cm, Diameter 5.8 cm
features: Candle with "RAL Quality Mark" is an official European quality standard, which guarantees the raw materials used in candles and the combustion properties; products with this certification guarantee the health and safety of our consumers
Easy to use, cut the wick to a height of 1 cm.
Retains colour and shape throughout the entire burn time; the candle produces little smoke and has a minimum of drops
Made in the EU / Made in Europe
description: Product Description Basic pillar candles and/or table candles, candles must not be missing on an elegantly set table. Classic size with smooth surface and high quality and perfect combustion. Colour: white. Safety Warning Never leave burning candle unattended. Keep the candle away from children and pets. Leave at least 5 cm distance between two burning candles. Keep burning candle away from flammable products such as curtains and fabrics. Do not place burning candle between draughts. Keep away from fire. Keep the wick at a height of no more than 0.5 cm. Extinguish the candle with the candle snuffer Be careful not to drop matches and dirt over the burning candle. Remove the packaging before using the product. Only place the product on heat-resistant surfaces.

specifications_table.Occasion: Anniversary, Christmas, Housewarming, New Year, Winterproof
